ValidationRule.description: If Country Code is '+91' then user can enter exactly 10 digit, otherwise user can enter maximum upto13 digit.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( By_Pass_Validation__c, false, IF( ISPICKVAL(Country_Code__c, "+91"), LEN(Phone__c) <> 10, LEN(Phone__c) > 13 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If country code is +91, phone must be exactly 10 digits. If other country code, phone can be maximum 13 digits.
